problem.highlighted_element: import { User, Lock, ArrowRight, AlertTriangle } from "lucide-react";

problem.description: This word is normally spelled with a hyphen.
The verb 'transcode' does not usually follow articles like 'a'. Check that 'transcode' is spelled correctly; using 'transcode' as a noun may be non-standard.
The verb 'set up' is spelled as two words. The noun 'setup' is spelled as one.
Did you mean the verb log in instead of the noun 'login'?
A verb or adverb may be missing or misspelled.
Long sentences (50 words here) are harder to read, according to the research; consider splitting
In American English, abbreviations like "etc." require a period.
The reference includes files outside the project #loc
The reference includes files outside the project #loc
The reference includes files outside the project #loc
Deprecated symbol used, consult docs for better alternative #loc
